details.note: Stub generation script for missing locale keys. Reads en.ts, finds missing keys across all 17 locales, inserts [LANG] stubs with // TODO: translate comments.
details.pattern: standalone Bun script with shebang and top-level await

details.note: Added stub-locales script entry: bun run script/stub-locales.ts
20/20 parity tests pass, all 17 locales have all 971 keys, no regressions
